title: Chapter i
content: The voyage began on a Tuesday. The captain raised the anchor and the ship pulled out of the harbor on a quiet sea.

title: Chapter ii
content: Three days later, a storm gathered on the horizon. The crew battened down the hatches.

title: Chapter iii
content: When the sun rose on the fourth day, the ship was alone on the open ocean. No land in sight.

title: Chapter iv
content: Provisions were running low. The captain ordered rationing.
